# Glossary

Use this template to keep terminology consistent across languages.

## Terms

| Term | Translation | Meaning | Preferred Usage | Avoid |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| firmware | firmware | Software running on embedded devices. | Use for MCU or device-side software. | Do not use for host applications. |
